tagline: ADU and manufactured-home builders for Sonoma County and the North Bay
seoDescription: Culvert Opps Construction (West Coast ADU) builds accessory dwelling units, manufactured homes, and fire-rebuild homes across Sonoma County and the North Bay. Licensed CA general building contractor, Lic. #804241.
heroHeading: ADUs and manufactured homes, built with integrity in the North Bay
heroSubheading: Culvert Opps Construction designs, permits, and builds accessory dwelling units and manufactured homes across Sonoma County — from site prep and foundations to the finished, move-in-ready unit.
highlights: ADUs, manufactured homes, and fire-rebuild specialists
Serving Sonoma and Marin counties since the 2015 North Bay fires
aboutHeading: Building homes when they're needed most
aboutBody: Culvert Opps Construction got its start in the aftermath of the 2015 Northern California fires, when it was among the first to step in and help families who had lost their homes. Providing fast, dependable housing became the company's mission, and it has shaped how the team works ever since.

Operating as West Coast ADU, the company designs, permits, and builds accessory dwelling units and manufactured homes across Sonoma County and the wider North Bay. Owner Darron Peter and his crew handle the work from the ground up — excavation, foundations, and demolition through to the finished, move-in-ready home — including the crane sets that drop a manufactured unit onto its new foundation.

Culvert Opps is a licensed California general building contractor (Lic. #804241) and has pulled permits on more than 50 projects across the region in recent years, with a focus on ADUs, manufactured dwellings, and rebuilding after fire.

services.title: Accessory Dwelling Units (ADUs)
services.description: Detached, attached, and garage-conversion ADUs chosen from hundreds of floor plans — added income, family space, and property value in the backyard.

services.title: Manufactured & prefab homes
services.description: HUD-approved manufactured and prefab homes, set on new foundations with our own crane and crew.

services.title: Fire rebuilds
services.description: Replacement homes and ADUs for families rebuilding after the North Bay fires — the work we were founded on.

services.title: Excavation & site prep
services.description: In-house excavation, grading, and site preparation to get a lot ready to build.

services.title: Foundations & structure
services.description: Engineered foundations and pier systems, including hillside and raised-deck builds.

services.title: Demolition
services.description: Concrete and structure demolition to clear a site for new construction.

team.name: Darron Peter
team.bio: Darron leads Culvert Opps Construction and West Coast ADU, running projects from excavation and foundations through the finished, move-in-ready home across Sonoma and Marin counties.

notes: CONFIRMED via web research. The lead's listed website culvertopps.com is a PARKED HugeDomains for-sale page (NOT the business) — all facts there were domain-sale boilerplate and were discarded. The business's REAL active site is westcoastadu.com (footer: 'Powered by Culvert Opps', License #804241, same phone). Business: Culvert Opps Construction, also operating as West Coast ADU. Owner: Darron Richard Peter. Address: 512 Scenic Ave, Santa Rosa, CA 95407. Phone: (707) 236-7624. Email: culvertopps@gmail.com. CSLB Lic. #804241 'General Building, Manufactured Housing', Active (verified Jan 2026). BuildZoom score 118 (top 1% of CA contractors); 50+ permitted projects in recent years (19 in 2025, 13 in 2024). Founded in response to the 2015 N. CA fires. Specialties: ADUs, manufactured/prefab homes, fire rebuilds, excavation, foundations, demolition. Real verbatim taglines from their site: 'We Build With Integrity.', 'Your Project is our Priority.', 'Transforming Spaces Into Possibilities', 'Empowering homeowners with innovative ADU solutions.' FAQ content quoted from westcoastadu.com/faqs. Real ADU cost range they publish: $50,000-$350,000+. NO verifiable reviews/ratings (BuildZoom: none posted) — rating OMITTED. NO hours published — left empty. NO attributable testimonial quotes — left empty. Photos are their OWN real project photos pulled from westcoastadu.com/about (jobsite, crane sets, foundations, finished ADUs).
